mapper.sql: id, connection_code, provider_type, base_url, api_key_ciphertext, api_key_mask, enabled, remarks, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: insert into llm_provider_connections ( connection_code, provider_type, base_url, api_key_ciphertext, api_key_mask, enabled, remarks, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{connection.connectionCode}, #{connection.providerType}, #{connection.baseUrl}, #{connection.apiKeyCiphertext}, #{connection.apiKeyMask}, #{connection.enabled}, #{connection.remarks}, #{connection.createdBy}, #{connection.updatedBy} ) returning id
mapper.update: update llm_provider_connections set connection_code = #{connection.connectionCode}, provider_type = #{connection.providerType}, base_url = #{connection.baseUrl}, api_key_ciphertext = #{connection.apiKeyCiphertext}, api_key_mask = #{connection.apiKeyMask}, enabled = #{connection.enabled}, remarks = #{connection.remarks}, updated_by = #{connection.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{connection.id}
mapper.select: select from llm_provider_connections order by id desc
select from llm_provider_connections where id = #{id} and enabled = true
